description: Convert the AIS traffic data CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/ais_data/solent_traffic_20231015.csv into a Bridge Command scenario named 'p) Solent AIS Traffic 20231015' in the directory /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent AIS Traffic 20231015/. The scenario must contain an environment.ini (Solent world, 14:00 start, >=8.0nm visibility), an ownship.ini (MV Dorado at 50.78N, -1.15W, heading 310, speed 6.0), and an othership.ini defining 8 unique vessels from the AIS data with at least 2 waypoint legs each. Ensure /home/ga/.config/Bridge Command/bc5.ini is configured with arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, and max_radar_range=72. Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/ais_data/conversion_report.txt listing the converted vessels and methodology.
